name: Cima Alla Genovese II (Salsa Verde)
recipeIngredient: 2 Red bell peppers, roasted and finely chopped
1 medium Onion, red (1 cup), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
To make Salsa Verde:
1. Heat 3 tablespoons olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
2. In the hot oil, sauté shallots and anchovies until shallots are softened, about 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. In a bowl, combine 1 cup olive oil, red wine vinegar, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Add the cooled shallot-anchovy mixture and remaining ingredients (either roasted bell peppers or pimientos, onion, celery, parsley, and hard-cooked eggs). Stir until thoroughly combined.
5. Adjust seasoning as needed and set aside to serve with fish or pasta.
